zh.lifeSummary: 當Mildred Cooke於1524年8月24日出生在英國艾可洛福德時，她的父親Sir. Anthony Cooke19歲，母親Anne FitzWilliam20歲。她於1545年12月21日與Sir William Cecil在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1589年4月5日在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特享年64歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mildred Cooke于1524年8月24日出生在英国艾可洛福德时，她的父亲Sir. Anthony Cooke19岁，母亲Anne FitzWilliam20岁。她于1545年12月21日与Sir William Cecil在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1589年4月5日在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特享年64岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Mildred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name Mildþrӯð, derived from mild ‘gentle’ + þrӯð ‘strength’. This was the name of a 7th-century abbess, who had a less famous but equally saintly elder sister called Mildburh and a younger sister called Mildgӯð; all were daughters of a certain Queen Ermenburh . Their names illustrate clearly the Old English pattern of combining and recombining the same small group of name elements within a single family. This name was in fairly regular localized use until the early 18th century and it enjoyed a strong revival throughout England in the 19th century. Its use declined from the 1930s onwards.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mildred Cooke was born on 24 August 1524, in Romford, Essex, England, her father, Sir. Anthony Cooke, was 19 and her mother, Anne FitzWilliam, was 20. She married Sir William Cecil on 21 December 1545, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 5 April 1589, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mildred Cooke est née le 24 août 1524, à Romford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir. Anthony Cooke, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Anne FitzWilliam, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Cecil le 21 décembre 1545, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 avril 1589, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mildred Cooke am 24. August 1524 in Romford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir. Anthony Cooke 19 und ihre Mutter Anne FitzWilliam 20. Sie hat am 21. Dezember 1545 in England Sir William Cecil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. April 1589 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Westminster, Middlesex, England und wurde in Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mildred Cooke è nata il il 24 agosto 1524 nel Romford, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir. Anthony Cooke, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Anne FitzWilliam, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Cecil il 21 dicembre 1545, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 aprile 1589, nel Westminster, Middlesex, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mildred Cookeが1524年8月24日にイギリスエセックスロムフォードで生まれた時，父Sir. Anthony Cookeは19歳，母Anne FitzWilliamは20歳であった。1545年12月21日にイギリスでSir William Cecilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1589年4月5日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで64歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mildred Cooke(이)가 1524년 8월 24일 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir. Anthony Cooke(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne FitzWilliam(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1545년 12월 21일 영국에서 Sir William Cecil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1589년 4월 5일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.24 Aug 1524–5 April 1589: 24 de agosto de 1524–5 de abril de 1589
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mildred Cooke nasceu em 24 de agosto de 1524, em Romford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir. Anthony Cooke, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Anne FitzWilliam, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Cecil em 21 de dezembro de 1545, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de abril de 1589, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mildred Cooke родилась 24 августа 1524 г. в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir. Anthony Cooke было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne FitzWilliam, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Cecil 21 декабря 1545 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 5 апреля 1589 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.24 Aug 1524–5 April 1589: 24 de agosto de 1524–5 de abril de 1589
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mildred Cooke nació el 24 de agosto de 1524, en Romford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir. Anthony Cooke, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Anne FitzWilliam, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir William Cecil el 21 de diciembre de 1545, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de abril de 1589, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
